name: Wit's End

effects_structured.raw: Basic attacks deal 45 bonus magic damage on-hit.

simpleDescription: Resist magic damage and claw your way back to life.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Execution model: Fray is an on-hit magic-damage proc attached to basic-attack hits.
Player-visible behavior: Fray does not apply to structures, so turret hits should not receive the 45 bonus magic-damage packet.

sources.name: Data Dragon item dataset
sources.used_for: baseline item identity, stat block, and raw effect text

sources.used_for: secondary validation against canonical static item data mirror

sources.name: League Wiki (Wit's End)
sources.used_for: page-level verification of Fray on-hit magic-damage amount and structure-exclusion behavior
local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
